summary: Iteration 71 - Reservation Tab Navigation Testing. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. All 3 tabs (Aujourd'hui, Gestion, Planning) working correctly with proper API integration. Frontend: All features verified - 3 tabs with icons, KPI cards, activity section, reservations table, filter pills, search, pagination, Gantt chart, and action modal.
critical_code_review_comments: reservations.tsx: Well-structured 3-tab implementation with ViewMode type ('today' | 'gestion' | 'planning'). Default view is 'gestion' as requested.
Tab bar has clear icons (sunny-outline, briefcase-outline, calendar-outline) and smooth transitions via state change.

Aujourd'hui tab: KPI cards with stats (reservations today, active, upcoming, overdue), Activite Recente section, Dernieres Reservations table with Voir/Planning buttons, alert cards for overdue vehicles and pending payments.

Gestion tab: 3-column card layout with ReservationCard component, search bar, status filter pills (Toutes, Confirmees, En cours, Terminees, Annulees, En attente, Especes), pagination with Page X/Y display.
'Voir toutes les reservations' link correctly switches from Aujourd'hui to Gestion tab.
Planning tab: GanttChart component with month navigation (prev/next), legend, vehicle schedule bars, and 'Reservations du mois' section.
ReservationActionModal: Opens on card click with sections for Documents Client, Contrat, Etat des Lieux, Statut, Paiement.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reservation tab navigation fully tested. 3 tabs: Aujourd'hui (KPIs + activity + table + alerts), Gestion (cards + search + filter + pagination - DEFAULT), Planning (Gantt chart). Backend APIs: /admin/stats, /admin/reservations/today, /admin/overdue, /admin/reservations, /admin/vehicle-schedule all working. Action modal opens on reservation card click.

backend_api.GET /api/admin/stats: PASS - Returns KPI data (total_vehicles, total_reservations, total_users, total_revenue, reservations_by_status)
backend_api.GET /api/admin/reservations/today: PASS - Returns today's reservations with user_name, vehicle_name, status
backend_api.GET /api/admin/overdue: PASS - Returns overdue reservations with days_overdue field
backend_api.GET /api/admin/reservations?limit=200: PASS - Returns paginated reservations for Gestion tab
backend_api.GET /api/admin/vehicle-schedule: PASS - Returns vehicle schedule for Gantt chart

frontend_tabs.3_tabs_visible: PASS - Aujourd'hui, Gestion, Planning tabs all visible with icons
frontend_tabs.gestion_default: PASS - Gestion tab is default view

gestion_tab.filter_pills: PASS - Toutes, Confirmees, En cours, Terminees, Annulees, En attente, Especes
gestion_tab.pagination: PASS - Page X/Y display with prev/next buttons
gestion_tab.reservation_cards: PASS - 3-column layout with client, vehicle, dates, price, status

aujourdhui_tab.kpi_cards: PASS - 4 KPIs: Reservations aujourd'hui, En cours, A venir, Retards
aujourdhui_tab.activite_recente: PASS - Activity section with status dots
aujourdhui_tab.dernieres_reservations: PASS - Table with Client, Vehicule, Debut, Statut, Actions columns
aujourdhui_tab.alert_cards: PASS - Vehicule non rendu, Paiement en attente alerts

planning_tab.legend: PASS - Confirmee, En cours, Confirmee, Especes colors
planning_tab.gantt_chart: PASS - Vehicle rows with reservation bars
planning_tab.reservations_du_mois: PASS - List of month's reservations below chart

action_modal.opens_on_click: PASS - Opens when clicking Actions or Voir button
action_modal.reservation_info: PASS - Shows client name, vehicle, price
action_modal.sections: PASS - Documents Client, Contrat, Etat des Lieux, Statut, Paiement
action_modal.close_button: PASS - X button to close modal

playwright_tests_performed: Verify 3 tabs visible: Aujourd'hui, Gestion, Planning
Verify Gestion tab is default with search bar, filter pills, pagination
Click Aujourd'hui tab - verify KPIs, Activite Recente, Dernieres Reservations table
Verify 'Voir toutes les reservations' link switches to Gestion
Click Planning tab - verify Gantt chart with month navigation
Click Actions button - verify action modal opens with all sections
